zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III於1115年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林時，他的父親Roger II De Wavrin31歲，母親Emme DE LILLERS26歲。他和Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai至少有1個兒子。他去世於1166年在法國諾爾德瓦福林享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III was born in 1115, in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Roger II De Wavrin, was 31 and his mother, Emme DE LILLERS, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. He died in 1166, in Wavrin, Nord, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III est né en 1115, à Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Roger II De Wavrin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Emme DE LILLERS, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. Il est décédé en 1166, à Wavrin, Nord, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III 1115 in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger II De Wavrin 31 und seine Mutter Emme DE LILLERS 26. Er hatte mit Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1166 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wavrin, Nord, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III è nato il nel 1115 nel Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Roger II De Wavrin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Emme DE LILLERS, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. Morì nel 1166, nel Wavrin, Nord, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Roger De Wavrin IIIが1115年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Roger II De Wavrinは31歳，母Emme DE LILLERSは26歳であった。彼はYolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournaiとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1166年にフランスノードワvリンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III(이)가 1115년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger II De Wavrin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Emme DE LILLERS(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1166년 프랑스 노르드 와브린에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III nasceu em 1115, em Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Roger II De Wavrin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Emme DE LILLERS, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. Ele faleceu em 1166, em Wavrin, Nord, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III родился в 1115 г. в местности ваврин, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger II De Wavrin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Emme DE LILLERS, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности ваврин, норд, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Roger De Wavrin III nació en 1115, en Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Roger II De Wavrin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Emme DE LILLERS, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Yolande Mathilde DE MORTAGNE de tournai. Murió en 1166, en Wavrin, Nord, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
